description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named gcc syntax checks that runs on every push to master, development, and pull-request/* branches and on pull requests to master and pull-request/* branches. The workflow consists of multiple jobs, each running on an ubuntu-22.04 environment, checking the syntax of C++ code with different GCC versions and standards (C++03, C++11, C++14, C++17, C++20, C++23) with and without STL, and with forced C++03 implementation.
